title: Limit Maces
description: A Spigot Plugin to limit the amount of maces allowed in a server
body:
# THIS MOD IS OUTDATED! update to latest versions coming soon

## What is this plugin and what does it do?
This is a plugin that limits the amount of Maces in a server
## How can I change the amount of maces allowed
You can change the amount of maces in the config (`plugins\Limit-Mace-Amount\config.yml`)
## How does this plugin work?
Whenever someone crafts a mace it adds one to the mace count (`plugins\Limit-Mace-Amount\maceCount.txt`) and it will block you from crafting a mace if the mace count exceeds or is equal to the max mace count
## Warning!!
Changing the max Mace count will not remove any maces and will have to be done manually, and if someone destroys a Mace it will not show in the Mace count, however you can manually edit the mace count (`plugins\Limit-Mace-Amount\maceCount.txt`)
